abilities.name: Beer Goggles
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel if the attacking model has a friendly Poison token.

abilities.name: On the House
abilities.text: After an enemy model within 6" gains a Poison token, this model may deal 1 damage to it.

abilities.name: Rolling Doom
abilities.text: When this model would move, it may drain a (soulstone) to remove any number of markers it moves through.

actions.name: Crushing Barrel
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, move the target up to 3".

triggers.name: Shower of Booze
triggers.text: Models within (r)2" gain a Poison token.

triggers.name: Accidental Roll Over
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring other models. Enemy models moved through this way must pass a TN 10 Df duel or be dealt 1 damage and gain a Poison token.

actions.name: Spray of Shine
actions.effects: Deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Poison token.

triggers.name: The Flaming Turner
triggers.text: This model gains a Burning token, then move all models within (r)6" 6" toward this model.

actions.name: Onward
actions.effects: This model may declare the Walk action.
